subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! All praise be unto Thee for having guided me unto the Manifestation of Thine Own Self, the Dayspring of Thy Revelation, and the Source of Thy Signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی لک الحمد بما هدیتنی الی مظهر نفسک و مشرق وحیک و مطلع آیاتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action
